name: Cocoa Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 Apples; cored and grated or finely chopped (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together eggs, sugar, margarine, and water until fluffy.
2. Sift flour, cocoa, baking soda, cinnamon, and allspice into a bowl.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and mix well.
4. Fold in nuts, chocolate, apples, and vanilla until evenly distributed.
5. Spoon the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch loose bottom tube pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees F for 60 to 70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Makes 1 cake serving 10 portions.
